test_qa02_ec_phone_boundary_lengths

URL
https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
Timestamp
2026-06-10 04:21:23
Bug ID
QA-02 -013
Priority
P2

Phone numbers at boundary lengths: form must accept the input without crashing. Default country is +966 Saudi Arabia which expects ~9 digits. Other lengths may legitimately disable Send Code as a validation signal — that is correct behavior, not a bug. We verify the form remains responsive and the input was accepted; we do NOT assert Send Code becomes enabled at every length — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en. Test parameters: 7, min, 7, digits.

Expected
Phone numbers at boundary lengths: form must accept the input without crashing.
Actual
The test waited for an element to appear, but it never showed up within 20000ms. The element may not exist on the page, or the page is loading very slowly.

QA-02 -001 MEDIUM P2
Failed: Test qa02 ec empty phone send code disabled
https://dev.mehadedu.com/en test_qa02_ec_empty_phone_send_code_disabled 2026-06-10 04:21:23 21.88s
What this test was checking
EC-M-01: Empty phone field — Send Code must stay disabled — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Enter a phone number in the WhatsApp number field
  3. Click the 'Send Code' button
  4. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
What should happen
EC-M-01: Empty phone field — Send Code must stay disabled.
What actually happened
The test waited for an element to appear, but it never showed up within 20000ms. The element may not exist on the page, or the page is loading very slowly.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
Download .webm

E   playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.wait_for: Timeout 20000ms exceeded.
E   Call log:
E     - waiting for locator("button:has-text(\"Log In\"), button:has-text(\"تسجيل الدخول\")").first to be visible

https://dev.mehadedu.com/en test_qa02_ec_close_modal_mid_flow 2026-06-10 04:21:23 21.94s
What this test was checking
EC-M-08: Closing modal mid-flow must close without session creation — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Click the 'Log In' button in the page header
  3. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
What should happen
EC-M-08: Closing modal mid-flow must close without session creation.
What actually happened
The test waited for an element to appear, but it never showed up within 20000ms. The element may not exist on the page, or the page is loading very slowly.

QA-02 -013 MEDIUM P2
Failed: Test qa02 ec phone boundary lengths
https://dev.mehadedu.com/en test_qa02_ec_phone_boundary_lengths 2026-06-10 04:21:23 21.87s
What this test was checking
Phone numbers at boundary lengths: form must accept the input without crashing. Default country is +966 Saudi Arabia which expects ~9 digits. Other lengths may legitimately disable Send Code as a validation signal — that is correct behavior, not a bug. We verify the form remains responsive and the input was accepted; we do NOT assert Send Code becomes enabled at every length — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en. Test parameters: 7, min, 7, digits.
Test data used
params: [7, min, 7, digits]
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Enter a phone number in the WhatsApp number field
  3. Use these parameters: 7, min, 7, digits
  4. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
What should happen
Phone numbers at boundary lengths: form must accept the input without crashing.
What actually happened
The test waited for an element to appear, but it never showed up within 20000ms. The element may not exist on the page, or the page is loading very slowly.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
Download .webm
    raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None

E   Call log:
E     - waiting for locator("button:has-text(\"Log In\"), button:has-text(\"تسجيل الدخول\")").first to be visible

Failed: Test qa02 ec homepage no crash on rapid clicks
https://dev.mehadedu.com/en test_qa02_ec_homepage_no_crash_on_rapid_clicks 2026-06-10 04:21:23 16.85s
What this test was checking
Rapid clicks on Log In must not crash the page — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
What should happen
Rapid clicks on Log In must not crash the page.
What actually happened
The test waited for an element to appear, but it never showed up within 15000ms. The element may not exist on the page, or the page is loading very slowly.

https://dev.mehadedu.com/en test_qa02_ec_otp_input_placeholder_is_zeros 2026-06-10 04:21:23 21.86s
What this test was checking
OTP input placeholder must be '000000' as per spec — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
Test data used
TEST_COUNTRY_CODE · TEST_PHONE
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Enter a phone number in the WhatsApp number field
  3. Enter the OTP code that arrives via WhatsApp
  4. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
What should happen
OTP input placeholder must be '000000' as per spec.
What actually happened
The test waited for an element to appear, but it never showed up within 20000ms. The element may not exist on the page, or the page is loading very slowly.

QA-02 -016 MEDIUM P2
Failed: Test qa02 ec phone boundary lengths
https://dev.mehadedu.com/en test_qa02_ec_phone_boundary_lengths 2026-06-10 04:21:23 21.86s
What this test was checking
Phone numbers at boundary lengths: form must accept the input without crashing. Default country is +966 Saudi Arabia which expects ~9 digits. Other lengths may legitimately disable Send Code as a validation signal — that is correct behavior, not a bug. We verify the form remains responsive and the input was accepted; we do NOT assert Send Code becomes enabled at every length — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en. Test parameters: 9, 9, digits, saudi, valid.
Test data used
params: [9, 9, digits, saudi, valid]
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Enter a phone number in the WhatsApp number field
  3. Use these parameters: 9, 9, digits, saudi, valid
  4. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
What should happen
Phone numbers at boundary lengths: form must accept the input without crashing.
What actually happened
The test waited for an element to appear, but it never showed up within 20000ms. The element may not exist on the page, or the page is loading very slowly.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
Download .webm
